name: GetnIteration
scriptCode:
import json

data = json.loads(Input_List)

# Get the combined string from the 'REPL' key
repl_value = data[Count]['REPL']

# Split the string by the comma
# Example: ",0" becomes ["", "0"]
parts = repl_value.split(',')

# Assign to your existing variables
RORN = parts[0]
RORL = parts[1]
